title: Kofi and the Lost Baby Elephant
synopsis: Young Kofi discovers a lost baby elephant in the savanna and helps reunite it with its family, learning about kindness and friendship along the way.

pages.text: Kofi walked through the tall golden grass. The sun was warm on his face. He loved exploring the savanna!

illustration.description: A young boy with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes walking through golden grassland in gouache painting style with thick brushstrokes and warm savanna colors
illustration.alt: Kofi walking through tall golden grass

pages.text: Suddenly, Kofi heard a sad sound. "Trumpet! Trumpet!" Behind a big baobab tree, he found a tiny baby elephant. The little elephant looked lost and scared.

illustration.description: A small baby elephant trumpeting sadly next to a large baobab tree, with Kofi who has short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes approaching, painted in gouache with textured painterly strokes and warm orange tones
illustration.alt: Baby elephant trumpeting by a baobab tree with Kofi nearby

pages.text: "Don't cry, little one," said Kofi gently. "I will help you find your mama." The baby elephant looked at Kofi with big brown eyes. It stopped crying and took a step closer.

illustration.description: Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes kneeling beside the baby elephant, both looking at each other, painted in gouache with bold confident strokes and golden grass background

pages.text: Kofi and the baby elephant walked together. They looked behind rocks and trees. "Mama elephant must be somewhere," said Kofi. The baby elephant held Kofi's hand with its trunk.

illustration.description: Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes walking hand-in-trunk with the baby elephant through the savanna, painted in warm gouache colors with thick brushstrokes and orange sunset lighting
illustration.alt: Kofi and baby elephant walking together holding hands

pages.text: Then they heard a loud "TRUMPET!" A big mama elephant came running toward them. She wrapped her trunk around her baby. "You found each other!" laughed Kofi.

illustration.description: A large mama elephant embracing her baby with her trunk while Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes watches happily, painted in gouache with expressive animals and bold confident strokes against golden grass
illustration.alt: Mama elephant hugging baby elephant with Kofi watching

pages.text: The mama elephant touched Kofi's head gently with her trunk. "Thank you," she seemed to say. Kofi waved goodbye as the elephant family walked away together into the sunset.

illustration.description: Mama elephant gently touching Kofi who has short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes with her trunk while baby elephant stands beside them, painted in gouache with warm orange sunset colors and textured painterly style
illustration.alt: Mama elephant thanking Kofi with trunk touch

metadata.illustrationStyle: gouache painting, thick brushstrokes, warm savanna colors, expressive animals, textured painterly, golden grass, orange sunset, bold confident strokes

questions.question: Where did Kofi find the baby elephant?
questions.explanation: Kofi found the baby elephant behind a big baobab tree.

questions.question: What sound did the baby elephant make?
questions.explanation: The baby elephant made a trumpeting sound when it was sad.

questions.question: How did the baby elephant hold Kofi's hand?
questions.explanation: The baby elephant held Kofi's hand with its trunk as they walked together.

questions.question: What did mama elephant do to thank Kofi?
choices: touched his head with her trunk
questions.explanation: Mama elephant gently touched Kofi's head with her trunk to say thank you.
